steps.title: Signal the unresolved contrast
steps.content: The sentence first says historians have identified the likely authorship of many pseudonymous essays, using "Publius" as an example. It then contrasts that success with pen names that remain elusive.

steps.title: Choose a contrast transition
steps.content: Choice A reinforces the previous point instead of contrasting it. Choice C signals similarity. Choice D would make the unsolved pen names examples of identified authorship, which reverses the meaning. The remaining transition marks the needed contrast. The answer is B.
